title: SaaS Analytics Dashboard
tagline: Real-time analytics for a UK logistics firm.
problem: The client needed unified visibility across shipments, revenue, and fleet performance without juggling spreadsheets.
solution: We built a React dashboard with role-based access, live charts, and exports — deployed on a managed cloud stack.
outcome: Launched in 6 weeks with faster reporting cycles and fewer manual errors for the operations team.

title: Mobile Commerce App
tagline: Orders, payments, and delivery tracking for a growing retail brand.
problem: The business needed a reliable mobile storefront with offline-friendly browsing and trusted local payments.
solution: We delivered a cross-platform app with secure checkout, order history, and push notifications for promotions.
outcome: Higher conversion on mobile and a clearer fulfillment workflow for the client’s team.

title: AI Customer Support System
tagline: 24/7 answers grounded in the client’s knowledge base.
problem: Support volume was growing fast, and repetitive questions were slowing the team down.
solution: We implemented an AI assistant with retrieval over their docs, escalation to humans, and analytics on topics.
outcome: Reduced first-response time and freed the team to focus on complex cases.

title: Chrome Productivity Extension
tagline: Capture tasks and notes without leaving the browser.
problem: The team lost context switching between tabs and tools while researching and planning.
solution: We shipped a Manifest V3 extension with quick capture, tagging, and sync to their workspace API.
outcome: Faster note-taking workflows and fewer dropped action items during busy days.

title: ERP Workflow Automation
tagline: Connecting inventory, approvals, and finance in one flow.
problem: Manual handoffs between departments caused delays and inconsistent records.
solution: We are building automated workflows with approvals, audit logs, and integrations to their ERP endpoints.
outcome: On track to cut cycle times and improve data accuracy across teams.

title: Real Estate Listing Portal
tagline: Search, save, and inquire — built for a competitive regional market.
problem: Listings were scattered across channels and lead follow-up was inconsistent.
solution: We created a modern portal with map search, saved searches, and CRM-ready lead routing.
outcome: More qualified inquiries and a cleaner pipeline for the sales team.
